metadata.learning_goal: 理解 Context Engineering 的核心概念，并能结合场景解释其作用。
metadata.summary: Context engineering keeps learning goals, evidence, and past mistakes in a stable structure. Retrieved evidence should support the answer instead of adding irrelevant details.
metadata.title: Context engineering keeps learning goals, eviden
